mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_like (post_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_like WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_like WHERE user_id = #{userId}
